goal: Add a `simple-cache` defclass in package `cache` storing key-value pairs, with two generic functions: `cache-put` (cache key value) → value, and `cache-get` (cache key &optional default) → stored value or default (default defaulting to NIL). Provide a constructor `make-cache` taking no arguments. Keys are compared with EQUAL (so strings work as keys). Export `simple-cache`, `make-cache`, `cache-put`, and `cache-get`.

predefined_plan.issue: Define the simple-cache CLOS class and its make-cache constructor so cache instances can be created.
acceptance_criteria: cache:simple-cache is a defined CLOS class

predefined_plan.issue: Implement cache-put and cache-get together so a value stored under a key can be retrieved via the same key (EQUAL comparison). Both symbols are required by this single round-trip test.
acceptance_criteria: cache:cache-put stores a value under a key
cache:cache-get retrieves the value previously put under the same key
keys compare with EQUAL so string keys work

predefined_plan.issue: Make cache-get return the supplied default (or NIL when omitted) for keys that were never put.
acceptance_criteria: cache-get with explicit default returns that default for absent keys
cache-get without default returns NIL for absent keys
